final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Transform(omrade, 25833) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'))
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 2 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 2, "action": "query"}

2.sql: SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Transform(omrade, 25833) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'))

2.description: retrieve 200-year storm-flood polygons (to be spatially reduced by municipality geometry)

3.description: get parcels (teig) within the municipality using kommunenummer filter

4.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: one row per teig (group by teigid) to remove duplicates

args.sql:
-- Reduce stormflo 200-year (klimaarna) to municipality extent
SELECT sf.*
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna sf
JOIN (
  SELECT ST_Transform(omrade, 25833) AS omrade_geom
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'
) k ON ST_Intersects(sf.omrade, k.omrade_geom)
;

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
       ST_XMin(envelope) AS minx, ST_YMin(envelope) AS miny, ST_XMax(envelope) AS maxx, ST_YMax(envelope) AS maxy
FROM (
  SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Envelope(omrade) AS envelope
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
) s;

FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune

;

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';
